mapper.select: SELECT id, assignment_group_id, player_name, top_weight, jungle_weight, mid_weight, adc_weight, support_weight, last_lane_1, last_lane_2, last_lane_3 FROM player_lane_weight WHERE assignment_group_id = #{assignmentGroupId} AND player_name = #{playerName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_lane_weight ( assignment_group_id, player_name, top_weight, jungle_weight, mid_weight, adc_weight, support_weight, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{assignmentGroupId}, #{playerName}, 20, 20, 20, 20, 20, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (assignment_group_id, player_name) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE player_lane_weight SET top_weight = #{topWeight}, jungle_weight = #{jungleWeight}, mid_weight = #{midWeight}, adc_weight = #{adcWeight}, support_weight = #{supportWeight}, last_lane_1 = #{lastLane1}, last_lane_2 = #{lastLane2}, last_lane_3 = #{lastLane3}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE assignment_group_id = #{assignmentGroupId} AND player_name = #{playerName}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM player_lane_weight WHERE updated_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day'
